title: The revolt in al-Kufah of Muhammad b. Ibrahim, called Ibn Tabataba, under the military leadership of Abu al-Saraya
description: The revolt in al-Kufah of Muhammad b. Ibrahim, called Ibn Tabataba, under the military leadership of Abu al-Saraya. Recorded under the year 198 AH (814–815 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
